commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `/verbose on` enable tool/progress summaries in normal Telegram groups, keeps `/verbose off` quiet, and adds focused dispatch tests plus Telegram docs.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main suppresses verbose/tool summaries for ordinary group chats and has tests that assert Telegram group text summaries stay hidden while forum topics are allowed.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor proof plus maintainer acceptance of the Telegram group disclosure policy, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(telegram): honor /verbose in groups
target.body:
## Summary

Makes `/verbose on` show tool/progress summaries in normal Telegram groups.

`/verbose off` keeps those summaries hidden. Telegram forum topics and Slack non-DM behavior are unchanged.

## Real behavior proof

Tested in a private Telegram QA group with a Driver bot and SUT bot.

Before fix on `origin/main`:
- `/verbose off` + `pwd` prompt: final reply only
- `/verbose on` + `pwd` prompt: final reply only

After fix on this branch:
- `/verbose off` + `pwd` prompt: final reply only
- `/verbose on` + `pwd` prompt: visible `🛠️ pwd` tool summary, then final reply

## Validation

- `OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_SERIAL=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts -t "Telegram group tool summaries|forum topic"`
  - `4 passed`
- `git diff --check`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`

## Notes

AI-assisted with Codex.
